question: What was TCS's total revenue from operations for the year ended March 31, 2026?
source_chunk_hint: Consolidated Statement of Profit and Loss - Revenue from operations line
rationale: Direct single-value lookup from P&L. Tests basic BM25 keyword match on 'revenue from operations'.

source_chunks.text:
TATA CONSULTANCY SERVICES LIMITED

Consolidated Statement of Profit and Loss

(= crore)

Note Year ended Year ended

March 31, 2026 March 31, 2025

Revenue from operations 12 2,67,021 2,55,324

Other income 13 4,402 3,962

TOTAL INCOME 2,71,423 2,59,286

Expenses

Employee benefit expenses 14 1,54,994 1,45,788

Cost of equipment and software licences 15(a) 4,399 11,648

Finance costs 16 1,227 796

Depreciation and amortisation expense 5,560 5,242

Other expenses 15(b) 35,230 30,481

TOTAL EXPENSES 2,01,410 1,93,955

PROFIT BEFORE EXCEPTIONAL ITEMS AND TAX 70,013 65,331

Exceptional items
